ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial period */,
  "period_ending" TEXT /* The end date of the financial period */,
  "period_type" TEXT /* Type of period (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* The fiscal year to which the period belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., income, expense, asset) */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., currency, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial period */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the financial metric for the period */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the data entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the data entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., accountant, financial analyst, CFO) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt used for password hashing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser or application used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the adjustment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_type" TEXT /* Type of adjustment (e.g., depreciation, amortization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_adjustments_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts_receivables" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial period */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount due from the customer */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_receivables_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget entry */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial period */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial metric */,
  "planned_value" REAL /* Planned value for the metric in the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial period */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial metric */,
  "forecasted_value" REAL /* Forecasted value for the metric in the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "old_value" REAL /* Old value of the data before the change */,
  "new_value" REAL /* New value of the data after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the security role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the security role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
